title: Alignment or Text Position (align)
text: Alignment or Text Position (align) This property determines whether the labels (that is, the representation of a ValRep value) for radio group buttons appear to the Left or Right (default) of the buttons. Value Description (default) The default. Left The representations appear to the left of the radio buttons. Right The representations appear to the right of the radio buttons. Limitations If the representations are left-aligned, a 3D effect cannot be applied to the radio buttons. Applies To uradiogroup (RadioGroup) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
